ECROS-5400UV: LCD Screen Specification

Version: 1.0

Date: 2026-04-15

Source of truth: This document is generated from src/domain/constants/screens.json. Source Screen IDs from txt files are preserved as traceability metadata and are not used as unique keys.

Global State Variables

FieldSource/usage
state.screenruntime id of the active window
inputTargetcurrent input target
returnScreenreturn screen after a dialog
warningReturnreturn screen after a warning
previousScreenprevious screen in the route
saveMeta.groupsaved file group
fileContext.groupactive file-manager group

Screens

SYS-BOOT · Welcome Window

IDboot
Legacy WNDWND-01
ModeSystem
Statusimplemented

LCD mockup

[object Object] [object Object] [object Object] [object Object]

Window description

Purpose: Welcome Window is used as a system in the "System" group.

Information meaning: The window captures the "System" scenario state and links runtime id "boot" to unified index SYS-BOOT.

Content: LCD content is assembled from fields: logo, softwareVersion.

Relation to other windows: Outgoing routes lead to: diagnostic.

Source Screen IDs: 1-1

Source integrity: merged

State table

FieldType/meaningSource/usage
logostate value or LCD placeholderUsed by LCD renderer or handlers for screen "boot".
softwareVersionstate value or LCD placeholderUsed by LCD renderer or handlers for screen "boot".

Transition routes

Action/buttonGuardOperationTarget screen
timer—runtime boot timerdiagnostic · Diagnostics

MW-RUN · Multi-Wavelength Measurement

IDmultiWaveRun
Legacy WNDWND-27
ModeMulti-wavelength analysis
Statusimplemented

LCD mockup

[object Object] [object Object] [object Object] [object Object] [object Object] [object Object] [object Object]

Window description

Purpose: Multi-Wavelength Measurement is used as a measurement in the "Multi-wavelength analysis" group.

Information meaning: The window captures the "Multi-wavelength analysis" scenario state and links runtime id "multiWaveRun" to unified index MW-RUN.

Content: LCD content is assembled from fields: multiWaveGraphData, multiWaveMeasurements, selectedSignal.
